overview: Bant Ouroboroid leverages mana acceleration and efficient creature threats to establish early board presence while maintaining card advantage. By cycling through Quantum Riddler and growing Badgermole Cub, the deck applies consistent pressure without overextending. Nature's Rhythm ensures you can cast larger threats ahead of schedule, allowing you to dictate the pace of the game. The win condition relies on outpacing opponents in resource conversion and closing the game with a resilient, value-driven board state.
win_conditions: Trading efficiently to maintain a superior board state
Accelerating mana to cast oversized threats early
Generating card advantage through Quantum Riddler to outlast opponents
Growing Badgermole Cub into a resilient finisher

keep_criteria: Hands with two or more lands and a one-drop threat
Combinations featuring Nature's Rhythm and a cheap creature
Hands containing Quantum Riddler with early interaction or ramp
mulligan_criteria: Hands with three or more lands and no early plays
Hands lacking curve or card advantage engines
Hands with only high-cost threats and no acceleration

early_game: Play lands and cheap creatures like Badgermole Cub to establish presence
Hold interaction for opponent's early threats
Use Nature's Rhythm to untap lands or generate extra mana for turn two or three plays
mid_game: Deploy Quantum Riddler to filter the deck and find answers or threats
Trade efficiently to preserve your growing creatures
Begin casting larger threats accelerated by your mana base
late_game: Focus on board control and value generation
Let Badgermole Cub grow into a resilient blocker and attacker
Use card advantage to outmaneuver opponent's late-game resources

key_cards.name: Badgermole Cub
key_cards.notes: Play on curve to establish board presence. Choose whether to pay for immediate stats or let it enter with counters based on matchup needs.

key_cards.name: Quantum Riddler
key_cards.notes: Use to dig for removal, ramp, or larger creatures. Protect it when possible as it fuels the deck's consistency.

key_cards.name: Nature's Rhythm
key_cards.notes: Cast early to enable turn-two or turn-three plays. Sequence it to untap lands for combat tricks or to cast multiple spells in a turn.

sequencing_tips: Hold removal or interaction until the opponent commits to a threat
Cast Nature's Rhythm before deploying Quantum Riddler to maximize mana efficiency
Let Badgermole Cub grow before trading it into larger blockers
Prioritize card advantage over board wipes in close games

matchups.advice: Prioritize early blockers and efficient trades. Use Nature's Rhythm to accelerate into resilient threats.
Apply pressure with multiple small threats to force removal. Save Quantum Riddler for late-game value.
Race with efficient threats while maintaining card parity. Use ramp to outpace their curve.

overview_evidence.evidence_span: Bant color pie emphasizes efficiency and value, supported by Nature's Rhythm's ramp and Quantum Riddler's card selection.
